rootCause: Many quest trees reused a placeholder completion reward (1 x cured compost bucket), which made rewards thematically inconsistent and reduced progression variety.
resolution: Audited all quest rewards and replaced cured compost bucket rewards with tree-appropriate rotating reward pools. Updated 177 quests across 17 trees (3dprinting:12, aquaria:13, astronomy:15, chemistry:10, completionist:5, composting:2, devops:15, electronics:12, energy:10, firstaid:13, geothermal:13, hydroponics:20, programming:18, robotics:10, rocketry:2, ubi:2, woodworking:5) and documented the updated reward policy in each affected Skills doc.
